task_phases: takeoff; offboard; go-to; follow-path; land; behavior tree
cancel_path: action cancellation and BT branch change
failure_path: alert events; platform loss; behavior failure
recovery_path: hover; emergency hover/land; aircraft emergency land
setpoint_trace: motion-reference topics plus behavior action events
sitl_support: Gazebo assets and documented simulation projects
adapter_cost: medium; map platform events to canonical producer/mode trace
replay_feasibility: high for ROS bags and deterministic BT missions
selection_reason: Native ROS 2, explicit task/cancel/emergency interfaces, compact modular deployment, and current maintenance make it the lowest-cost real workload for trace acquisition.

task_phases: control; estimation; planning; mapping; task modules
cancel_path: service/action cancellation in separately versioned modules
failure_path: PX4 API loss; controller/estimator failure; safety manager
recovery_path: MRS safety controller plus PX4 failsafe
sitl_support: documented one-drone simulator and Gazebo packages
adapter_cost: high; pin px4_api/core/simulator dependencies and identify true handoffs
selection_reason: Strong PX4 and SITL realism, but distributed packages and rolling PPA increase provenance and adapter cost.

px4_support: MAVROS/PX4 configuration and attitude setpoint bridge
ros_version: ROS 1 Noetic; experimental incomplete ROS 2 Jazzy port
task_phases: takeoff; mapping; global/local planning; tracking; landing
cancel_path: abort topics and ROS action abort
failure_path: planner failure; estimator/control fault; operator land-here
recovery_path: LandTracker; safety UI; PX4 fallback configuration
setpoint_trace: SO3Command to MAVROS AttitudeTarget plus planner/action events
sitl_support: Unity/simulation launch assets; PX4 real configuration present
adapter_cost: high; ROS1 bridge or finish incomplete ROS2 dependencies
replay_feasibility: medium using bags, but environment reconstruction is costly
selection_reason: Valuable fast-flight workload, but license restrictions, ROS1-first architecture, and incomplete ROS2 port make it unsuitable for the first acquisition.
